command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Search for kuma password in docker-compose / env files ==="
find /home/jose -maxdepth 4 \( -name "docker-compose*.yml" -o -name "*.env" -o -name ".env" \) 2>/dev/null | head -20

echo "=== Check uptime-kuma compose/env specifically ==="
for f in $(find /home/jose -maxdepth 4 -path "*uptime*" -name "*.yml" -o -path "*kuma*" -name "*.env" 2>/dev/null); do
  echo "--- $f ---"
  grep -iE "password|kuma|admin" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -5
done

echo "=== Check docker inspect env for password ==="
docker inspect uptime-kuma --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "pass|admin" || echo "no password in container env"

echo "=== Homepage config may reference kuma creds ==="
grep -riE "kuma|uptime" /home/jose/homepage/config/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "pass|key|token" | head -5 || echo "no kuma creds in homepage config"
REMOTE
